[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11000010 3
1 10100110 4
2 01101100 4
3 10001101 4
4 01010010 3
5 01000100 2
6 11000010 3
7 01110001 4

01 10 00000000 a
12 21 00000000 a
23 32 00000000 a
34 43 01000000 1
45 54 01000000 1
56 65 01000000 1
67 76 01000000 1
70 07 01000100 2 match 5

02 20 10000101 3
13 31 00000000 a
24 42 00000100 1
35 53 01000010 2
46 64 01000000 1
57 75 01000000 1
60 06 01010001 3
71 17 00000000 a

03 30 01010010 3 match 4
14 41 00000000 a
25 52 10000000 1
36 63 01010000 2
47 74 01000100 2 match 5
50 05 11000010 3 match 0 6
61 16 00100000 1
72 27 00001100 2

04 40 01000100 2 match 5
15 51 00000000 a
26 62 00000001 1
37 73 01000000 1
